zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Arderne於1322年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿爾萬利時，她的父親John de Arderne24歲，母親Alice de Venables23歲。她於1349年與Henry Delves在英國英格蘭爾多丁頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年之後在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德爾維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Arderne于1322年出生在英国英格兰爾阿爾萬利时，她的父亲John de Arderne24岁，母亲Alice de Venables23岁。她于1349年与Henry Delves在英国英格兰爾多丁頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年之后在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德爾維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Arderne was born in 1322, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Arderne, was 24 and her mother, Alice de Venables, was 23. She married Henry Delves in 1349, in Doddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1385, in Delves, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Arderne est née en 1322, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Arderne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice de Venables, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Delves en 1349, à Doddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1385, à Delves, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Arderne 1322 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Arderne 24 und ihre Mutter Alice de Venables 23. Sie hat 1349 in Doddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Henry Delves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1385 in Delves, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Arderne è nata il nel 1322 nel Alvanley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Arderne, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Alice de Venables, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Henry Delves nel 1349, nel Doddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1385, nel Delves, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Arderneが1322年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで生まれた時，父John de Arderneは24歳，母Alice de Venablesは23歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアドッドイントンでHenry Delvesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年以後にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアデルベスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Arderne(이)가 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 앨반리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Arderne(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Venables(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 도딩턴에서 Henry Delves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 델브스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Arderne nasceu em 1322, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Arderne, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Venables, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Delves em 1349, em Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1385, em Delves, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Arderne родилась в 1322 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Arderne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Venables, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Delves в 1349 г. в местности доддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1385 г. в местности делвесь, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Arderne nació en 1322, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Arderne, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice de Venables, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Henry Delves en 1349, en Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1385, en Delves, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
